news.paragraph: Airbnb is seeing mixed developments as Argus Research raised its price target to $165 while maintaining a buy rating. This optimism is countered by a recent SEC filing showing an insider sold shares worth over $8.8 million. Additionally, the company remains a focal point in industry reports regarding travel personalization and sports sponsorship trends.
headlines: Airbnb Insider Sold Shares Worth $8,853,375, According to a Recent SEC Filing
